description_long: This is a heavy-duty electric drill, predominantly blue with black and silver accents, featuring a robust plastic and metal body. The drill has a pistol-grip handle with a textured black auxiliary handle for added control, and a long, spiral twist drill bit attached at the front. The main body displays visible ventilation slots and a brand logo, with red highlights around the trigger area and branding. The drill's casing appears to be made of durable plastic, while the chuck and drill bit are metallic, indicating strength for demanding tasks. The overall design is ergonomic, with a sturdy build suitable for construction or repair work in urban environments. The drill is compact but substantial, suggesting it is powered by an internal mechanism, with no visible power cord or battery pack.
description: A robust blue and silver electric drill with a long twist bit, ergonomic handle, and visible brand logo, designed for heavy-duty urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue and silver body, black auxiliary handle, and long twist drill bit.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed end of the twist drill bit and the circular chuck.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the brand logo, trigger area, and auxiliary handle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the handle and the overall compactness of the drill.
